# meshstack_building_block_definitions (Data Source)

List building block definitions with optional workspace filter. Prefer this plural data source with `one(...)` for reusable wiring in examples. For each returned definition, this data source performs an additional API call to load all versions; use `workspace_identifier` to narrow scope where possible. 

~> **Preview:** This resource is in preview. Breaking changes are possible without prior notice due to changes in the underlying [meshStack preview API](https://docs.meshcloud.io/api/technical-specifications#preview-endpoints) or due to changes in this provider. Please ensure you are running the latest version of the provider and report any bugs via [GitHub issues](https://github.com/meshcloud/terraform-provider-meshstack/issues) or via support@meshcloud.io.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "meshstack_building_block_definitions" "example" {
  # Optional server-side filter: limit to one workspace.
  # Additional filtering (e.g. by display name) is done in Terraform expressions.
  workspace_identifier = "my-workspace"
}

# Example: select exactly one BBD by display name pattern.
# (Use can(regex(...)) so non-matching entries are filtered without evaluation errors.)
locals {
  selected_bbd = one([
    for bbd in data.meshstack_building_block_definitions.example.building_block_definitions : bbd
    if can(regex("^Example Building Block.*$", bbd.spec.display_name))
  ])
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `workspace_identifier` (String) Optional workspace identifier filter (maps to `workspaceIdentifier` query param).

### Read-Only

- `building_block_definitions` (Attributes List) Matching building block definitions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--building_block_definitions))

<a id="nestedatt--building_block_definitions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `building_block_definitions`

Optional:

- `version_latest_release` (Attributes) Latest released version. Null when no release exists yet. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--building_block_definitions--version_latest_release))

Read-Only:

- `metadata` (Attributes) Building block definition metadata. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--building_block_definitions--metadata))
- `ref` (Attributes) Reference to this building block definition (for dependency refs). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--building_block_definitions--ref))
- `spec` (Attributes) Key specification fields for selecting a definition. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--building_block_definitions--spec))
- `version_latest` (Attributes) Latest version (including drafts). Useful for BB specs that may target drafts. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--building_block_definitions--version_latest))
- `versions` (Attributes List) All available versions, sorted ascending by version number. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--building_block_definitions--versions))

<a id="nestedatt--building_block_definitions--version_latest_release"></a>
### Nested Schema for `building_block_definitions.version_latest_release`

Read-Only:

- `content_hash` (String) Content hash of the version.
- `number` (Number) Version number.
- `state` (String) State of the version.
- `uuid` (String) UUID of the version.


<a id="nestedatt--building_block_definitions--metadata"></a>
### Nested Schema for `building_block_definitions.metadata`

Read-Only:

- `owned_by_workspace` (String) Workspace identifier owning this definition.
- `uuid` (String) UUID of the building block definition.


<a id="nestedatt--building_block_definitions--ref"></a>
### Nested Schema for `building_block_definitions.ref`

Read-Only:

- `kind` (String) The kind of the object. Always `meshBuildingBlockDefinition`.
- `uuid` (String) UUID of the building block definition.


<a id="nestedatt--building_block_definitions--spec"></a>
### Nested Schema for `building_block_definitions.spec`

Read-Only:

- `display_name` (String) Display name of the definition.
- `target_type` (String) Target type (`TENANT_LEVEL` or `WORKSPACE_LEVEL`).


<a id="nestedatt--building_block_definitions--version_latest"></a>
### Nested Schema for `building_block_definitions.version_latest`

Read-Only:

- `content_hash` (String) Content hash of the version.
- `number` (Number) Version number.
- `state` (String) State of the version.
- `uuid` (String) UUID of the version.


<a id="nestedatt--building_block_definitions--versions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `building_block_definitions.versions`

Read-Only:

- `content_hash` (String) Content hash of the version.
- `number` (Number) Version number.
- `state` (String) State of the version.
- `uuid` (String) UUID of the version.
